canvas.description: Editor canvas — between root and surface. Central editor canvas, scenes preview frame.

surface-elevated.description: Resting low-emphasis elevation — nested cards inside surface-base, list rows; also the hover target for flat surface-base surfaces.

surface-hover.description: Hover lift on raised surfaces — interactive feedback above surface-solid (added 2026-05-04 by design lead)

panel.description: Floating-chrome panel surface — sidebar, composer, right-bar + similar framing panels. Solid #181818, a subtle lift above the page (surface.root #0F0F0F) and softer than surface-raised buttons. Added 2026-06-29 (Val).

glass.description: Frosted panels — canonical composer / sidebar bg @ 50%

glass-deep-strong.description: Sticky chrome — TopHeader @ 82% (paired with backdrop blur)

modal-backdrop.description: Modal / lightbox blur backdrop — AssetModal layer 1, asset-reference-lightbox

elev.description: Elevated surface — alias of surface-solid (one step above surface). Used by chat user message bubble fill.

shell.description: Shell surface — alias of surface (subtle). Used by chat assistant bubble fill (until commit #2 removes its use).

card.$description: Card-level surface aliases — independent of page bg.root so cards can have their own backdrop for image-bleed fade effects.

fade.description: AssetCard image-bleed backdrop — colour revealed at the bottom of the card where the image mask fades to transparent. Klyp dark: same as page bg.root (#0F0F0F) so the fade reads as a seamless ambient gradient. Unreals light overrides this to a dark neutral so the image fade still goes dark-to-transparent (the light page bg.root would wash the bottom of every cover to off-white).

scrim.$description: Media scrim — constant DARK overlay/fade painted UNDER text that sits on top of imagery (cover photos, asset thumbnails, generation previews). THEME-INVARIANT: identical value in klyp dark AND unreals light (semantic.unreals.tokens.json repeats the same values, does NOT override). A caption over an arbitrary photo must always read as white-on-dark regardless of brand theme — so these tokens must never alias to bg/surface/fg tokens, which flip per theme. base = the dark colour stop; on / on-muted = the text/icon colours on top.

base.description: Dark scrim colour — solid backdrop revealed under an image mask-fade (AssetCard/ChoiceCard) and the opaque colour stop in bottom-of-image scrim gradients (used inside color-mix(... X%, transparent) for the fade). surface.root (#0F0F0F), same in both brands.

on.description: Primary text/icon on a media scrim — constant near-white (alpha-white-90, matches klyp fg.primary intensity) in BOTH brands so titles stay legible over photos on light-theme unreals.

on-muted.description: Secondary text on a media scrim (descriptions, sub-labels) — constant muted white (alpha-white-70), both brands.

faint.description: Faintest hairline border — Dropdown pill trigger (Val 2026-06-29: 0.03 opacity)

focus.description: 1px inset focus stroke, paired with mix-blend-mode:plus-lighter

accent-purple.description: Secondary purple label accent (MetaLabel tone='accent'). Klyp dark: purple.900 #e0c6ff — light lavender, high contrast on dark. Unreals overrides to purple.400 (dark, reads on light). Added 2026-06-17 (MetaLabel gold→purple).

on-active-nav.description: Solid white text/icon when nav item is in active state. Klyp uses primitive neutral.0 (#fff) directly because semantic fg.primary at 90% reads visibly translucent against the dark active wash. Unreals (light theme) overrides to dark text in semantic.unreals.tokens.json.

icon-disabled.description: Disabled icon foreground (paired with wrapper opacity ~0.3-0.5). Klyp keeps it pure white because the wrapper opacity creates the muted look; on light theme Unreals overrides to dark.

icon-muted.description: Solid rest colour for outline icons — NO alpha (multi-path glyphs double-composite under alpha colours, see frontend.md Icon transparency). neutral.500 #6e6e6e reads dim on the dark surface and stays legible on Unreals light without an override. Lift to fg.on-active-nav on hover/selection. Added 2026-07-02 (Val: command-palette icons).

accent.description: Primary CTA fill — ⭐ solid pastel-gold brand accent #FDD59A (gold.700). Accent fill pairs with DARK text (--color-fg-inverse). Restored from the brief iris swap 2026-06-29 (Val).

accent-muted.description: Primary CTA fill end / muted accent (gold.500).

status.$description: Status semantic aliases. Mapped onto Geist scales (2026-05-13). Geist position semantics: 100-300 = component backgrounds, 400-600 = borders, 600-700 = vibrant fills, 800-900 = text/icons, 1000 = lightest tint. We use *-900 for fg/icon (highest legibility on dark), *-700 for strong vibrant fill, *-300 for muted destructive/success/warning fill end.

danger.description: Danger fg/icon/border on dark — red.600 #e95053, a true saturated red (≈ Geist error #e5484d), 5.03:1 on surface. Was red.900 #ffc2bd which read as PINK (semantic fix 2026-06-17).

danger-strong.description: Danger solid fill (destructive button bg) — red.500 #c4363c, deep true red, white text passes 5.33:1. Was red.700 #ff716f (light coral).

danger-muted.description: Destructive fill end / muted dark bg (red.300 #882327).

info.description: Info / in-progress fg — canvas node 'In Progress' border + status pill (CANVAS-SPEC §8.4). Distinct from accent (gold).

ring.description: Global :focus-visible fallback for native elements outside RAC. Neutral white-20 — gold reserved for true accents (CTA, key state), not blanket focus halo. See .claude/rules/styles.md.

badge.$description: Brand-aware subtle Badge palette. Klyp dark: bg = -200 dark-tinted shade, fg = -900 vibrant fg (Geist convention 100=darkest, 1000=lightest). Unreals light: overridden in semantic.unreals.tokens.json to bg = -1000 (lightest tint) + fg = -700 (vibrant mid) so subtle stays subtle on white. Added 2026-05-26.

gold-bg.description: Subtle gold badge bg — dark warm-gold wash (gold.700 @ 15%). Dedicated token (not the shared overlay.gold-* washes) so the gold-intent Badge / BadgeToggle stay gold. Unreals overrides to the brand-accent (blue) wash.

gold-fg.description: Klyp dark: warm-gold text for the Popular badge (gold.700 accent). Unreals overrides to blue.700 (brand accent on light theme).

gold-10.description: Soft gold tint — chip selected wash, episode card glow stop (gold.700).

gold-12.description: Soft gold tint — AssetCard hover/focus underlay, app-rail active wash (gold.700).

gold-15.description: Gold hover gradient stop — series cover-block (gold.700).

gold-30.description: Scrollbar thumb / inset gold border — attachment-tray, script-editor (gold.700).

mention.$description: Asset-mention pills. Remapped 2026-05-13 onto Geist *-900 shades (variant B per design lead) — same kind→hue intent as the prior pastel-custom palette, now sourced from a coherent 10-step scale per kind.

vibe.description: Asset-mention pill — vibe (paired with outfit, same hue).

prop.description: Asset-mention pill — prop (Geist amber-900, was yellow.400).

bg-node-default.description: Canvas node body — default fill (matches generic surface).

bg-node-hovered.description: Canvas node body — hovered fill (raised lift).

bg-node-selected.description: Canvas node body — selected fill (one step elev). NOTE: substituted from plan's `surface-active` (no such token); using `surface-solid` for the selected state.

border-node-default.description: Canvas node border — default. NOTE: substituted from plan's `border.muted` (no such token); using `border.subtle` (5% white).

border-node-generating.description: Canvas node border — In Progress (blue, animated by NodeFrame). CANVAS-SPEC §8.4.

handle-text.description: Node connection handle — text I/O. Bumped 2026-05-10: was {color.fg.muted} (white@50%) — invisible 12px dot against dark canvas. Now full white (alpha-90) so users can see grab/drop targets. Loses kind-discrimination vs other handles but ensures visibility.

handle-media.description: Node connection handle — generic media (mixed). Bumped 2026-05-10: was {color.fg.subtle} (white@30%) — invisible against dark canvas. Now full white (alpha-90) so users can see grab/drop targets.

handle-bg-default.description: Card v3 (design lead 2026-05-12): handle bg in idle/generating — same as node bg so handle 'blends' with frame, contrast comes from border ring + icon. Mockup v6.3.

handle-bg-selected.description: Card v3 (design lead 2026-05-12): handle bg in selected — lifted neutral mid (#2F2F2F surface.hover) for contrast against #222 card bg. Mockup v6.3 (was neutral.775 #2B2B2B).

handle-border-default.description: Card v3 (design lead 2026-05-12): handle ring in idle/generating — white 14%. Mockup v6.3.

handle-border-selected.description: Card v3 (design lead 2026-05-12): handle ring in selected — white 22%. Mockup v6.3.

border-card-v3-selected.description: Card v3 (design lead 2026-05-12): NEW canvas card selected border — white 10%, replaces gold. Single-accent rule: gold reserved for true accents, selection on a busy canvas with N nodes can't all be gold without diluting. Mockup v6.3.

dot.description: Canvas background dot fill (xyflow <Background variant=Dots>). Equivalent contrast to Magnific's rgb(100,100,100) on pure black; on our neutral.950 bg this lands at ~0.28 alpha-white so dots read clearly at default zoom (≈0.75). 2px circle @ 19px gap. Vignette mask in CanvasViewport.scss further fades corners (Magnific-style sharp falloff at 595px from center).

sticky-bg.description: Sticky-note marker bg. Remapped 2026-05-13 from legacy yellow.400 (#facc15) to Geist amber.700 (#ffb224) — same warm-yellow intent, now sourced from coherent amber scale. Not part of single-accent budget — sticky is informational paper, not attention.

slider.$description: AllowanceSlider / Slider brand-wrapper palette. Brand-aware so the same component renders correctly on dark (klyp) + light (unreals) without the SCSS swapping tokens by brand. All values overridden in semantic.unreals.tokens.json. Added 2026-05-27 by design lead — light-theme contrast pass on AllowanceSlider/AllowancePanel.

rail.description: Unfilled portion of the slider track. Klyp dark: white 30%. Unreals light: black 18%.

fill.description: Filled portion (progress) of the slider track. Klyp dark: alpha-white-90 (design lead 2026-05-20 «при заполнении пусть будет 100%»). Unreals light: accent (blue.700) — high contrast on white panel + brand-aware progress signal.

thumb-bg.description: Slider thumb (pill stamp) bg fill. Klyp dark: white pill on dark rail. Unreals light: solid accent (blue.700) fill so the thumb reads as a distinct chip on the white panel — chevron icon flips to inverse white.

thumb-border.description: Inset border of the thumb. Klyp dark: black 12% (subtle inner stroke on the white thumb). Unreals light: transparent — solid accent thumb already has full contrast against the white panel.

thumb-icon.description: Color of the chevron glyph inside the thumb. Klyp dark: dark glyph on white pill (--color-bg-canvas = neutral-925). Unreals light: white glyph on accent-blue pill (--color-fg-inverse). Key fix 2026-05-27 — previously alias resolved to white on white on unreals, glyph was invisible.

thumb-halo-drag.description: Outer halo ring around the thumb during pointer drag — `box-shadow 0 0 0 4px <halo>`. Klyp dark: white 15% glow. Unreals light: accent blue 25% — visible feedback that reads on white.

tick-inactive.description: Inactive tick label color. Klyp dark: white 30%. Unreals light: black 38% — visible-but-quiet so the active tick (fg.primary) still pops.

panel.$description: Glass panel surface (AllowancePanel and similar slot-shaped cards). Klyp dark: white 3% glass with matching 3% border + backdrop-blur (design lead 2026-05-22 lighter glass). Unreals light: subtle inversion to a near-transparent darker tint so the panel still reads as a container against the white tier card — pure white-on-white would dissolve the chassis. Added 2026-05-27.

glass-bg.description: Bg fill for the glass panel. Klyp: white 3%. Unreals: black 4% — gentle tonal step below the white parent surface.

glass-border.description: Border matching the glass bg. Klyp: white 3%. Unreals: black 8% — slightly stronger than bg so the chassis edge reads clearly.

tier-mesh.$description: Per-tier mesh palette for `<PricingTierCard>` perpetual goo-mesh blobs. Three stops per tone: `primary` (saturated, drives blob `b` bottom-right), `shadow` (deeper, drives blob `d` bottom-left), `light` (lighter accent shade, drives blob `c` added 2026-05-21 to break the 8-bit colour-quantization banding that caused shimmer on dark tones — adds a third floating gradient at a different depth so the mesh has more breathing tonal layers). Used inside `color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-tier-mesh-X) 16%, transparent)` so tone changes ripple to mesh without touching the SCSS.

primary-silver.description: Starter tier mesh primary — light off-white highlight. neutral.1000 (#eeeeee, ≈ old neutral.50) at 16% alpha in the radial gradient produces the light-silver glow.

shadow-silver.description: Starter tier mesh shadow — muted silver depth (neutral.700 #a0a0a0, ≈ old neutral.500 #A1A1A1).

light-silver.description: Starter tier mesh light accent — pure white #FFFFFF. Lightest stop on the silver scale; drives blob `c` for an additional bright highlight on top of the neutral-50 primary.

primary-purple.description: Creator tier mesh primary — saturated purple highlight (mirrors MeshButton purple palette).

shadow-purple.description: Creator tier mesh shadow — deeper purple depth.

light-purple.description: Creator tier mesh light accent — mid-purple #763DA9 (purple.800, one tone darker than purple.900 lavender). Drives blob `c`. design lead 2026-05-23: «фиолетовый светлый который самый — на тон темнее возьми из примитивов». NB: now same hex as shadow-purple — visual distinction comes from blob c's gradient opacity vs blob b's shadow.

primary-gold.description: Creator Plus tier mesh primary — warm light gold (gold.800 #caae84, paired with the gold `--color-fg-accent` and the Most Popular badge gradient).

shadow-gold.description: Creator Plus tier mesh shadow — deep muted gold (gold.500 #856940).

light-gold.description: Creator Plus tier mesh light accent — light cream gold (gold.900 #e2ceb0). Drives blob `c`.

primary-blue.description: Studio tier mesh primary — Klyp blue (sits below status-info but above blue-300 so the mesh reads cooler/deeper than the hover-trio's status-info blue).

shadow-blue.description: Studio tier mesh shadow — deep blue depth.

light-blue.description: Studio tier mesh light accent — Klyp brand blue #52A8FF (blue.900, also `--color-status-info`). Drives blob `c`.

thumb-width.description: Canvas reference / library-reference thumbnail width. Mockup v6.3 — 240px gives audio thumbs enough lane for waveform + filename without crowding the canvas; image/video preview stays in the same lane for consistency.

r.$description: Semantic radii — 7 aliases. Consolidated 2026-05-13 from prior 9-alias set (button → chip, card-inner → card, canvas-card → panel, toggle → chip). Added --r-inner-section 2026-05-21 to enforce concentric formula `R_inner = R_outer − padding_outer` for items nested in popovers/cards. Naming matches industry pattern (Material 3, Polaris) but kept small for a solo-designer cognitive load.

inner-section.description: 8px — concentric inner radius for dropdown/menu items inside a popover. Use when outer is --r-section (16) with --space-8 padding, OR --r-card (12) with --space-4 padding (close-enough at small scale). Replaces ad-hoc `--r-card` for inner items in HistoryMenu / BrandMenu / BrandSelect.

chip.description: 10px — chips, status pills, badges, buttons, pill toggles, segmented controls. All small interactive surfaces.

card.description: 12px — cards (top-level + inner). AssetCard, AddCard, list items, dropdown items, scene cards.

panel.description: 20px — sidebars, inspectors, GlassPanel, canvas node cards (mockup v6.3).

disabled.description: Disabled-state visual dim — applied to wrapper / button / label when [data-disabled] or :disabled is set.

min-width.description: Popover / dropdown menu min-width — keeps share-menu, action-menu, etc. visually consistent and avoids cramped layouts when label set is short. Bumped 200 → 256 to match the live /referrals share menu (16rem) so 4-channel lists breathe (design lead, 2026-05-17).

type.$description: Curated text styles. Line box is an EXACT px value (line-box.*), NOT a unitless ratio — so font-size × line box is exactly whole, zero sub-pixel text (a ratio like 1.2857 gives 17.9998, not 18). Geist-parity. Rebuilt to px line boxes 2026-06-17.

body-tight.description: 14px / 18px (alias of body; kept for existing consumers).

gap.$description: Purpose-based gap aliases. Reach for these when intent is clear (cluster of chips, card-inner spacing, etc.). Otherwise use --space-N primitive directly. Renamed from t-shirt --sp-* on 2026-05-07; ported 2026-05-13.

cluster.description: Inline cluster items (chips, icon+text in a row, dense controls)

icon-text.description: Between an icon and its adjacent text label inside a button or chip

card-inner.description: Vertical/horizontal spacing between elements inside a card body

stack.description: Vertically stacked items (form rows, list items)

padding.$description: Purpose-based padding aliases. Reach for these when intent is clear. Otherwise use --space-N primitive.

section-x.description: Section horizontal padding (static fallback to --gutter-page-x for fluid routes)

section-y.description: Section vertical padding (static fallback to --gutter-page-y for fluid routes)

gutter.$description: Fluid gutters (clamp-based, scale by container-inline-size). Replace static --padding-section-*/--gap-grid on routes that opt into container-type: inline-size.

page-x.description: Fluid route horizontal gutter — space.16 (16px) → space.48 (48px)

page-y.description: Fluid route vertical gutter — space.16 (16px) → space.32 (32px)

card-lift-shadow.description: Card drop-shadow used by BalanceCard (ground-plane lift on dark surface).

card-inset-glow-gold.description: Gold inset bloom — PricingTierCard Creator Plus (gold tone) + BalanceCard primary hover. Pinned to {gold.700} (was {color.fg.accent}, which went iris on the 2026-06-29 brand-accent swap → gold cards bloomed purple). soft gold inset bloom inside the card body, paired with --fx-card-lift-shadow as the outer layer.

card-inset-glow-silver.description: BalanceCard non-primary hover — soft silver inset bloom (neutral counterpart to the gold variant).

card-inset-glow-purple.description: PricingTierCard purple-tone hover (Creator tier) — soft purple inset bloom (purple.700 = #8e4ec6, brighter mid-saturation than purple.500; bumped 2026-05-20 per design lead for more visible glow against the perpetual mesh). Matches the BalanceCard primary/silver pattern but for the Creator mesh palette.

card-inset-glow-blue.description: PricingTierCard blue-tone hover (Studio tier) — soft Klyp-blue inset bloom (--color-status-info = blue-900). Mirrors the gold/silver recipe so all four PricingTierCard tones share the same box-shadow contract.

button-highlight.description: Inset white highlight on buttons hover/pressed (Figma DS anchor — effect_3VPSU8)

gold-radial-40.description: Accent glow — badges / selected chips (legacy decoration). gold.700 #FDD59A (restored from the brief iris swap, 2026-06-29).

gold-linear.description: Primary/accent button fill — gold.800 (bottom, light) → gold.400 (top, dark). 0deg = upward.

accent-glow-bg.value: radial-gradient(60% 160% at 50% 135%, color-mix(in srgb, {color.accent} 35%, transparent) 20%, transparent 90%)
accent-glow-bg.description: Accent-glow radial — soft brand-accent glow rising from the lower centre, fades to transparent (lay over a dark surface). Brand-aware via {color.accent} (gold klyp / blue unreals). Pair with --fx-accent-glow-shadow on a position:relative rounded box. Consumers: Button variant='accent', TabSwitcher tone='accent'.

accent-glow-shadow.description: Accent-glow REST: uniform inset border (white 5%) over a soft inset accent inner-glow (blur 6). Inset-only → crisp on rounded corners, no layout shift, paints OVER content. Hover → --fx-accent-glow-shadow-hover (transition box-shadow).

accent-glow-shadow-hover.description: Accent-glow HOVER: border brightens (white 5%→30%) + accent inner-glow intensifies (blur 6→8). True-accent / key-state use only (single-accent rule).

neutral-glow-bg.value: radial-gradient(60% 160% at 50% 135%, color-mix(in srgb, white 35%, transparent) 20%, transparent 90%)
neutral-glow-bg.description: Neutral counterpart of --fx-accent-glow-bg — same radial geometry, white instead of {color.accent} (silver/gray read on the dark surface; follows the card-inset-glow-silver precedent). Consumer: Button variant='accent' glow='neutral'.

neutral-glow-shadow.value: inset 0 0 0 1px {alpha.white.15}, inset 0 0 6px 0 color-mix(in srgb, white 55%, transparent)
neutral-glow-shadow.description: Neutral-glow REST: identical structure to --fx-accent-glow-shadow with a white inner-glow (ring unchanged). Hover → --fx-neutral-glow-shadow-hover.

neutral-glow-shadow-hover.value: inset 0 0 0 1px {alpha.white.30}, inset 0 0 8px 0 color-mix(in srgb, white 80%, transparent)
neutral-glow-shadow-hover.description: Neutral-glow HOVER: mirrors --fx-accent-glow-shadow-hover (ring 15%→30%, glow blur 6→8) with a white inner-glow.

size.$description: UNIFIED button/control height scale. Current: 24/32/36/44/56 (xs/sm/md/lg/xl). Tuned 2026-06-30 (Val) for a more compact default — md 40→36 and lg 48→44, validated against a cross-DS button-scale audit (shadcn new-york & Mantine both ship a 36 default; 44 = Chakra lg / iOS touch-min). This deliberately leaves the even-8px ladder (was 24/32/40/48/56) because a 36 default cannot sit on an 8px grid; the shadcn-style 4px fine-step in the 32–36 working band is intentional, and lg 48→44 removes the oversized 36→48 (12px) jump (now 36→44 = 8px). Every button-like element (Button, SolidButton, MeshButton, TabButton, IconButton, CopyButton) sets `height` from this; so do form controls that share it (LabeledSelect, BrandSelect, PromptField Submit, AttachButton, TabSwitcher, AudioControls…) — so they move with it (intended: 'one control scale'). Square icon-only buttons use it for width+height; text buttons use it for height + control.pad-x for inline padding.

xs.description: Dense / mouse-only — Button xs, icon-xs, dense table & toolbar actions. = WCAG 2.5.8 min target; not a standalone CTA on touch.

sm.description: Compact — dense surfaces, secondary actions, footer chips.

md.description: ⭐ DEFAULT — primary + secondary actions across the app. 40→36 on 2026-06-30 (Val): shorter default button/control height. 36 = shadcn h-9 / Mantine sm / Linear default. Off the even-8px grid by design (a 36 default can't sit on 8px); sm 32→md 36 is an intentional 4px fine-step (shadcn-style). Text inputs are NOT affected (own scale in Input.scss); selects/large forms use lg=44.

lg.description: Large — prominent / marketing CTAs, touch-primary; also the shared form-control height (selects, PromptField Submit). 48→44 on 2026-06-30 (Val): keeps md→lg an even +8 after md dropped to 36 (was a 12px jump at 48). 44 = Chakra lg / iOS 44px touch-min.

xl.description: Hero — the single biggest CTA per screen / landing only.

pad-x.$description: Inline (horizontal) padding per button size — paired with control.size height for text buttons; scales with the height. Icon-only buttons use 0 (square).

prose.description: Reading column max-width (~768px). Used by chat thread, long-form content.

composer.description: Composer shell max-width (720px @ 16px root) — the chat prompt-input column, sits inside width.prose (48rem thread) with breathing room. Added 2026-07-02 (Composer v2 controlled contract — replaces the raw 720px in Composer.scss).

xs.description: 384px — bare ui/Dialog primitive default card width. Sits below the branded ramp; Modal always overrides it via its size classes.

dialog.description: 440px — Dialog kind (confirm / alert / prompt). Tightest modal width.

h-full.description: Height cap for the `full` modal — 720px or 86svh.

base.description: Default UI transition — alias of duration.normal (220ms). Used as semantic name in newer code.

emphasis.description: Apple HIG fluid emphasis curve — for hero motion / state changes that need extra snap.

spring.description: Overshoot spring curve — for transitions that should feel bouncy (shutter-up, slide-in). Used by canvas NodeBottomBar reveal.

min.description: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 AA — minimum interactive target. Floor for any tap surface (visual chip can be smaller, but tap area extends to this minimum).

comfort.description: Apple HIG / WCAG 2.5.5 AAA — comfort target. Apply via @media (any-pointer: coarse) on chips, dropdown triggers, icon buttons that are primary nav.

size.description: Material FAB standard. Floating action buttons in mobile editor surfaces (EditorActionFab). Single-accent (gold) — max 1 per screen.

handle-h.description: Drag-affordance bar at the top of bottom sheets — Apple-style.

peek-h.description: Bottom-sheet peek detent — ~30% of small viewport. Quick glance at sheet content without losing background context. svh (small-viewport-height) excludes the iOS dynamic toolbar.

expand-h.description: Bottom-sheet expand detent — ~88% of small viewport. Full content view, sheet still anchored to bottom with background peek above.

h-mobile.description: Mobile composer height — fluid 64 → 96 by container width. Used by FAB offset calc and viewport-relative sticky offsets.

kb-offset.description: iOS keyboard offset — overwritten at runtime by useKeyboardOffset hook (visualViewport.resize observer). Default 0 = no shift. Applied to sticky composer / fixed FAB on focus-blur transitions.

bottom.description: iOS home-indicator safe area — semantic alias of env() for use in calc()/cascade. Default 0 outside iOS.

row-estimate.description: Estimated chat message-row height for content-visibility placeholder sizing (contain-intrinsic-size: auto <this>) — used by rows that were never painted; once painted the browser remembers the real size. ~median row incl. paddings. Added 2026-07-02 (chat scroll de-virtualization).

root.description: Page background — light off-white (neutral.1000 #eeeeee, ≈ old neutral.50)

surface-elevated.description: Resting low-emphasis elevation — nested cards inside surface-base, list rows; also the hover target for flat surface-base surfaces. Light-theme: off-white tone (neutral.1000 #eeeeee) one step above the white surface-base — the lightest gray in the ramp between base (neutral.0) and hover (neutral.900).

surface-solid.description: Buttons, solid chips — slight tint over surface (neutral.1000)

surface-hover.description: Hover lift on raised surfaces — DARKER (light gray neutral.900 #d1d1d1; inverted from dark theme where hover is LIGHTER)

glass-deep-strong.description: Sticky chrome — white @ 82% (paired with backdrop blur)

modal-backdrop.description: Modal / lightbox backdrop scrim — semi-opaque white

shell.description: Shell surface — alias of root (subtle off-white, neutral.1000)

card.$description: Light-theme override: AssetCard image-bleed fade goes to a DARK neutral (neutral.900 = #141414), NOT bg.root (#EDEDED off-white). Otherwise the bottom 20% of every cover image would wash into the light page bg, killing the cinematic dark-fade contract that AssetCard relies on. Effectively this keeps Klyp's dark-fade aesthetic even on a light brand surface — covers stay punchy.

fade.description: AssetCard image-bleed backdrop — dark neutral (surface.base #141414) so light-theme covers still fade into darkness (cinematic), not into the off-white page bg.

scrim.$description: Media scrim — SAME values as semantic.tokens.json (klyp), repeated here intentionally so the cascade keeps them DARK on the unreals light theme too. A bottom-of-photo caption must read white-on-dark in both brands; aliasing to bg/surface/fg would flip it. Keep base/on/on-muted byte-identical to the klyp file.

base.description: Dark scrim colour — constant #0F0F0F (surface.root) in light theme too, so cover-image fades and bottom scrims stay dark (cinematic) instead of washing to off-white.

on.description: Primary text/icon on a media scrim — constant near-white even on the light brand, so titles over photos stay legible (was the bug: fg.primary resolved to black on light).

on-muted.description: Secondary text on a media scrim — constant muted white, both brands.

faint.description: Light-theme faintest hairline border (Unreals counterpart of border.faint)

accent.description: Light-theme: accent border — blue.500 #0267dd (WCAG 2026-06-17: blue.700 went light #5fa0ff in the APCA rebuild → 2.6:1 on white)
Light-theme accent — blue.500 #0267dd (5.27:1 on white). Repointed from blue.700 which went light in the APCA rebuild (WCAG fix 2026-06-17).

accent-muted.description: Light-theme: muted accent for backgrounds with weak emphasis

gold-10.description: Light theme: accent overlay 10% — repurposed gold-10 alias for blue (rename to overlay.accent-10 in Phase 2.3)

muted.description: Light-theme: secondary text — WCAG AA pass (5.2:1 on neutral.0, 4.8:1 on neutral.50). Raised from alpha.black.50 which failed 3.6:1 on neutral.50 (A11y P0 fix 2026-05-25).

subtle.description: Light-theme: DECORATIVE-ONLY (~2.0:1) — never for body text, only separators / glyph decoration

inverse.description: Light-theme: inverse text on dark accent — pure white

on-active-nav.description: Light-theme: active nav item text — dark (mirrors fg.primary intensity)

icon-disabled.description: Light-theme: disabled icon — black at 30% (semantic muted+ opacity)

accent.description: Light-theme: accent text — blue.500 #0267dd (5.27:1 on white, AA for normal text). Repointed from blue.700 (WCAG fix 2026-06-17).

accent-purple.description: Light-theme: secondary purple label accent (MetaLabel tone='accent') — purple.400 #7442a1, 5.94:1 on white. Klyp counterpart is purple.900 (light, on dark).

ring.description: Global :focus-visible on light bg — accent-coloured outline blue.500 #0267dd (5.27:1 on neutral.0, passes WCAG 2.4.11). Repointed from blue.700 which went light in the APCA rebuild (WCAG fix 2026-06-17).

status.$description: Light-theme status overrides (WCAG fix 2026-06-17). Without these, status.* inherited klyp's -900 (light) values → ~1.3:1 on the light page. Each fg/-strong uses a dark saturated step (passes ≥4.5:1 on white as text and pairs with white as a solid fill); -muted is the lightest tint (-1000) for subtle status backgrounds.

danger.description: Danger fg/icon on light — 4.59:1 on page.

mention.$description: Light-theme mention-pill overrides (WCAG fix 2026-06-17). MentionPill paints the kind colour as TEXT on a 12% tint of itself; without these it inherited klyp's -900 (light) → light-on-near-white (~1.3:1) on the light theme. Each kind repointed to the same dark saturated step its hue uses for badges/status.

character.description: character → blue.500 (dark, reads on its light tint).

shot.description: shot → muted dark (alpha-black-65, matches fg.muted on light).

handle-bg-default.description: Light theme: handle bg = white (same as node bg, contrast comes from border)

handle-bg-selected.description: Light theme: handle bg selected = slight grey lift (neutral.1000 off-white)

handle-border-selected.description: Light theme: handle ring selected 20% black

border-card-v3-selected.description: Light theme: canvas card selected border — 15% black

dot.description: Light theme: canvas background dot fill, inverted from white-0.28 to black-0.28

slider.$description: Light-theme override for AllowanceSlider palette (defaults in semantic.tokens.json). Rail inverts white-30 → black-18, fill switches to accent blue (was alpha-white-90 on dark = unreadable as black-90 on light), thumb becomes solid accent fill so it reads as a distinct chip on the white panel, glyph flips to inverse white, halo + tick-inactive use black equivalents. Added 2026-05-27 — AllowanceSlider/AllowancePanel light-theme pass.

rail.description: Light: black 15% — visible track on white panel without being heavy.

fill.description: Light: brand accent blue (blue.700) — high contrast on white, reads as progress.

thumb-bg.description: Light: solid accent pill (blue.700). White thumb on white panel would dissolve — accent fill makes it a distinct chip.

thumb-border.description: Light: no inset border — accent fill provides full contrast against white panel.

thumb-icon.description: Light: white chevron glyph (fg.inverse = neutral-0) on accent-blue pill. The default klyp value (--color-bg-canvas) resolved to WHITE on unreals → invisible glyph. Key 2026-05-27 fix.

thumb-halo-drag.description: Light: 25% accent-blue halo during drag — visible feedback on white.

tick-inactive.description: Light: black 40% — visible-but-quiet inactive tick. Active tick uses fg.primary (alpha-black-90) so the contrast step still reads.

panel.$description: Light-theme glass panel override. Klyp white-3% over dark canvas → unreals needs a darker tint over white surface so the panel chassis stays legible (white-3% over white = invisible).

glass-bg.description: Light: black 5% — gentle tonal step below the parent white surface.

glass-border.description: Light: black 10% — chassis edge slightly stronger than bg for legibility.

badge.$description: Light-theme subtle Badge: bg = -1000 (lightest tint) + fg = a DARK saturated step (-400/-500). WCAG fix 2026-06-17: the APCA rebuild made -700 light, so the old -700 fg failed (~2.3:1) on the -1000 tint; repointed each fg to the nearest step passing ≥4.5:1 on its tint. Gray uses neutral.900 (light tint) + neutral.100 (dark text).

gold-bg.description: Unreals: gold-badge bg = brand-accent (blue) wash @15% — no warm gold in this brand. Preserves the pre-2026-06-29 look (the gold badge previously read the shared overlay.gold-15, which resolves to accent on unreals).

gold-fg.description: Unreals light theme: Popular badge text uses brand accent blue.500 (no warm gold in this brand; matches new accent).

shadow.$description: Light-theme shadows. Override of primitives — heavy black 0.4-0.5 looks like sajev'evi bombs under floating elements on white bg. Tuned to ~0.08-0.12 black for subtle elevation that reads on light.

gold-inset.description: Selection glow — still uses accent (resolves to blue on unreals)

fx.$description: Light-theme effect overrides. button-highlight (inset top white-50) is invisible/lazy on light; gone. SolidButton ships its own inset+micro-shadow recipe.
